summary: Iteration 48: Verified fixes for GST/HSN showing 0 values, TDS threshold validation, and Amazon Push to Amazon button. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: GST/HSN Dashboard shows actual taxable values (₹2,900) and GST amounts (IGST ₹522). TDS Management correctly shows 0 entries for rent below ₹240,000 threshold. Amazon Orders page has tracking dialog with 'Save & Queue Only' and 'Save & Push to Amazon' buttons. Expenses Dashboard shows rent entries with correct gross_amount (₹50,000).
critical_code_review_comments: GST/HSN Summary (server.py lines 17443-17650): Correctly aggregates from sales_invoices items array with $lookup to master_skus for HSN codes, plus dispatches without invoices
TDS Calculation (server.py lines 16693-16813): Correctly checks threshold_per_transaction and threshold_annual before applying TDS. 194I rent threshold is ₹240,000
Amazon Push Tracking (server.py lines 20311-20431): POST /amazon/push-tracking endpoint uses Amazon SP-API confirmShipment with proper carrier mapping
AmazonOrders.jsx (lines 854-878): Tracking dialog has both 'Save & Queue Only' and 'Save & Push to Amazon' buttons with proper handlers
ExpensesDashboard.jsx (line 70): getExpenseAmount helper correctly uses gross_amount || amount || 0 for calculations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All fixes verified working: 1) GST/HSN Dashboard shows HSN 903290 with Taxable ₹2,900 and IGST ₹522 (aggregated from sales_invoices), 2) TDS Management shows 0 entries because rent expenses (₹50,000) are below 194I threshold (₹240,000), 3) Amazon Orders tracking dialog has 'Save & Queue Only' and 'Save & Push to Amazon' buttons, 4) Expenses Dashboard shows rent entries with gross_amount ₹50,000. No Amazon orders in preview environment to test full tracking flow.

Backend API Tests.GET /api/gst/hsn-summary: PASS - Returns 2-3 HSN codes with taxable values and GST amounts
Backend API Tests.GET /api/tds/sections: PASS - Returns 5 sections including 194I with ₹240,000 threshold
Backend API Tests.POST /api/tds/calculate: PASS - Returns TDS not applicable for ₹50,000 rent (below threshold)
Backend API Tests.GET /api/expenses: PASS - Returns 7 expenses with 3 rent entries having gross_amount
Backend API Tests.POST /api/amazon/push-tracking: PASS - Endpoint exists (returns 404 for non-existent order)
Backend API Tests.GET /api/sales-invoices: PASS - Returns 2 invoices with HSN codes in items
Backend API Tests.GET /api/master-skus: PASS - Returns 26 SKUs, 17 with HSN codes

Frontend UI Tests.GST/HSN Dashboard: PASS - Shows Taxable Sales ₹2,900, Total GST ₹522, IGST ₹522
Frontend UI Tests.HSN Summary Table: PASS - Shows HSN 903290 (Stabilizer) with Taxable ₹2,900, IGST ₹522
Frontend UI Tests.TDS Management: PASS - Shows 0 TDS entries (expected - rent below ₹240,000 threshold)
Frontend UI Tests.Expenses Dashboard: PASS - Shows rent entries with ₹50,000 gross_amount
Frontend UI Tests.Amazon Orders Page: PASS - Shows MFN Pending, Easy Ship, Tracking Added, Dispatched tabs
Frontend UI Tests.Amazon Tracking Dialog Buttons: PASS - Code verified: 'Save & Queue Only' and 'Save & Push to Amazon' buttons present

Code Review Verification.GST/HSN aggregation from sales_invoices: VERIFIED - Uses $unwind on items array with $lookup to master_skus
Code Review Verification.TDS threshold check: VERIFIED - Checks threshold_per_transaction before applying TDS
Code Review Verification.Tracking dialog buttons: VERIFIED - Both 'Save & Queue Only' and 'Save & Push to Amazon' buttons in DialogFooter
